payload.input: She turns to Ethan, guiding his hand back between her legs, showing him that she is wetter now, slick with the anticipation of transaction, of education, of becoming valuable property under the protection of an LLC that understands exactly what it is harvesting. "Tuesday," she reminds him, though they both know it is already Tuesday, the clock having crept past midnight while they watched. "We bring the phone. We bring ourselves. And we take everything they’re willing to give."  Ethan nods, his fingers moving with new purpose, mimicking the techniques they just watched, pressing against the anterior wall of her vagina until she gasps, her hips bucking, the purity ring catching the moonlight and throwing fractured blue shadows across the ceiling as she comes silently, biting his shoulder to muffle the sound, her body contracting around the emptiness that tomorrow, finally, will be filled.
